ext_description.message: Transform Chrome's new tab into a macOS aerial screensaver.

newtab_bootstrap_message.message: Phase 02 · Section A · Storage and i18n bootstrap

options_placeholder.message: Settings UI will be filled in across the upcoming sections of Phase 02.

options_video_reverse_proxy_note.message: If sylvan.apple.com isn't trusted by your system, the reverse proxy fetches videos for you. It auto-falls back to direct if the worker is unreachable.

options_video_local_note.message: Run an Apache server on localhost serving Apple aerial .mov / .mp4 files. See the README for setup.

options_video_show_refresh.message: Show refresh button on new tab

error_video_apple.message: Couldn't load videos from Apple's server. Try enabling the reverse proxy in settings, or trust sylvan.apple.com's certificate manually.

error_video_local.message: Couldn't reach the local video server. Check the URL in settings.

error_video_local_empty.message: Local server reachable but no .mov / .mp4 files found.
